products.title: 4200 Series Electric Strike
products.description: A traffic control solution for internal doors. It features a shallow back box, low current draw, field selectable voltage and fail safe/fail secure conversion without disassembly.

products.title: 5100 Series Electric Strike
products.description: The 5100 Series is a medium-duty electric strike designed for versatility with multiple faceplates and hardware included. It offers an all-in-one boxed solution for convenience and installation speed in the field.

products.title: 6100 Series Electric Strike
products.description: The 6100 Series are heavy-duty stainless steel construction rim exit strikes. They are ideal for drop-in replacement or new construction with five models providing coverage for many single or double door applications, including fire-rated doors.

products.title: 6200 Series Electric Strike
products.description: The 6200 Series includes 17 models of heavy-duty electric strikes. Integrated faceplate, stainless steel construction, and proven reliability make them ideal for new construction.

products.title: 6300 Series Electric Strike
products.description: The 6300 is a fire-rated, no-cut surface mounted strike designed for installation speed and convenience.

products.title: 6400 Series Electric Strike
products.description: The 6400 Series is a modular, fire rated strike that lets the user move, or even remove, the keeper, ramp or plug. Offered with both centerline and offset faceplates, it is the ultimate all-in-one strike.
